TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lamuan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 146 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 144 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 88%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lamuan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lamuan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lamuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lamuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lamuan hya' ga Panital. tay mkyahu' na Lamuan hya' ga Taluk. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Lamuan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Lamuan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lamuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa panital. taj mkjaħuʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa taluk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ lamuan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ lamuan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lamuan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 146 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 144 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 88%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lamuan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lamuan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lamuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lamuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lamuan hya' ga Panital. tay mkyahu' na Lamuan hya' ga Taluk. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Lamuan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Lamuan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lamuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa panital. taj mkjaħuʔ na lamuan ħjaʔ ɣa taluk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ lamuan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ lamuan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
